name: Easter Throw Jacquard Floral Green - Threshold™ Design with Studio McGee
description:
Get your home decor Easter ready with the Easter Throw from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. This multi-green throw is covered with floral jacquard weave pattern and fringe detailing along the ends for a beautiful look. Made of midweight fabric, this throw feels soft and cozy.

Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Looks like home, feels like you.
